product: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: "Fields" replaces "Dimensions": Genie Spaces now uses "Fields" instead of "Dimensions" in the metric view and SQL expressions interfaces.
what_it_does: "Fields" replaces "Dimensions": Genie Spaces now uses "Fields" instead of "Dimensions" in the metric view and SQL expressions interfaces. Benchmarks support agent mode: Benchmarks now support agent mode, which uses the same multi step reasoning as Genie Agent mode. Use the optional evaluation note to guide LLM based grading.
why_it_matters: Use benchmarks to score response accuracy at scale.
